---
title: "Contributing"
description: "How to contribute to UIAO — rendered from the canonical CONTRIBUTING.md at the repo root."
categories: [meta]
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Canonical source
This page renders the canonical
[`CONTRIBUTING.md`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
at the repository root.
:::

{{< include ../../CONTRIBUTING.md >}}
